objects.name: GamaWiper
objects.description: A destructive sandbox/VM killer script deployed by Gamaredon to wipe analysis environments and prevent malware analysis.

objects.name: GamaLoad
objects.description: Initial loader for Gamaredon campaigns, implements multi-stage payload fetch mechanism with dynamic URLs and headers.

objects.name: Pterodo
objects.description: Malware payload delivered by Gamaredon, with hardened delivery and geolocation-based deployment.
